2026-05-28ISEDBoards of Trade ActOrder approving the application by Camrose Chamber of Commerce (Alberta) ** Change of name **Order approving the application by the Camrose and District Chamber of Commerce, in Alberta, to change its name to the “Camrose Regional Chamber of Commerce”.N/A
subject: Order approving the application by Camrose Chamber of Commerce (Alberta) ** Change of name **
precis: Order approving the application by the Camrose and District Chamber of Commerce, in Alberta, to change its name to the “Camrose Regional Chamber of Commerce”.
